hypothesis_en: Mr President, first of all we regret that the Presidency of the Council and the President of the Commission, Mr Prodi, cannot be here to accompany the presentation made by the First Vice-President and the Commissioner for Budgets. We understand the reasons for this delay, but I also want the Commission to understand the problems caused to Parliament by this delay, which has already occurred, since we are going to do for the first time a budgetary exercise, which we started from the evaluation report on your annual political strategy document. On the other hand, Commissioner Reiner already knows that on the question of the financial perspectives this Parliament already has its own positions, mainly on the issue of safeguarding our parliamentary rights, the duration of the financial perspectives that this Parliament has already expressed and the priorities that we are going to put forward. On the question of new enlargements, Commissioner, you know that the position of this Parliament is that we must first ensure the capacity of the Union to absorb new members in an institutional and financial way, and as far as the categories are concerned, you are fully aware that we will support them, as we have done on other occasions. And finally, with regard to the financing of category 4, Madam Commissioner, you must address the Council fundamentally and in particular the signatories of the 1st Charter.
reference_en: thank you Mr (2.12) President (1.76) first and foremost I must say that it is regrettable that the President of the Commission and the p= presidency office are not in attendance for the presentations from the two Commissioners this afternoon I think it's a pretty important appointment I= so I can't imagine what political (1.74) reason takes them away from here anyway I'm grateful to the two Commissioners for their presentations we understand the reasons for the delay but I think the Commission should also understand that these delays causes substantial problems to the Parliament because for first time (2.24) we're we're kicking off on the basis of an assessment report on your annual poli= policy strategy document so please will you be able to stick to the timetable we've just heard from the budget's Commissioner we really can't accept any further delays furthermore Mrs Schreyer will be aware that for the financial perspectives the European Parliament already has its own positions primarily they'll question safeguarding our rights as a Parliament the duration of the financial perspectives which Parliament has also given its view on and also the priorities we're setting be= before (1.11) we set ceilings we need to have a very clear set of political priorities as far as enlargement is concerned Commissioner y= you will know that that this Parliament's position is that first and foremost we must see to it that the European Union is able to absorb new members both financially and institutionally and as for the categories you will know full well that we'll support you as we have done in the past for the creation of new posts provided we have a rational and sensible dynamic but what we need is greater clarity on this and finally as far as the financing of category four let me say Commissioner first of all you should turn to the Council and the signatories of the one percent letter as it is known
source_es: señor Presidente ah bien gracias señor Presidente lamentamos antes que nada que la Presidencia del Consejo y el propio Presidente de la Comisión Prodi no puedan estar aquí acompañando la exposición que han hecho la Vicepresidenta primera y la Comisaria de Presupuestos creo que es una ocasión importante y no podemos imaginar cuál es el compromiso político que les aleja de esta Asamblea hoy en cualquier caso quiero felicitar la exposición que han hecho los dos Comisarias es= comprendemos las motivos que han causado este retraso pero quiero que la Comisión comprenda también los problemas que causa al Parlamento este retraso que ya ha habido dado que nosotros vamos a hacer por primera vez un ejercicio presupuestario que arrancamos del informe de evaluación que hacemos sobre su documento de estrategia política anual por eso les pido y quiero que confirmen si pueden mantener el calendario que la Comisaria de Presupuestos acaba de de de explicar no podemos aceptar ningún retraso más por otra parte sabe ya la Comisaria Señora ~Raier que en la cuestión de las perspectivas financieras este Parlamento tiene ya sus propias posiciones fundamentalmente el tema de la salvaguardia de nuestros derechos parlamentarios la duración de las perspectivas financieras que este Parlamento también se ha pronunciado ya y las prioridades que vamos a tener queremos que antes de fijar los techos queden completamente claras las prioridades políticas de lo que vamos a financiar en la cuestión de las nuevas ampliaciones señora Comisaria sabe que la posición de este Parlamento es que primero debemos asegurar la capacidad de la Unión para absorber nuevos miembros de una manera institucional y financieramente y en cuanto a las categorías es usted plenamente consciente de que les vamos a apoyar como hemos hecho otras veces en la cuestión de los nuevos puestos siempre que entremos en una dinámica racional pero en cualquier caso vamos a necesitar una mayor definición y por último en lo que hace referencia a la financiación de la categoría cuatro señora Comisaria debe usted dirigirse fundamentalmente al Consejo y particularmente a los ~signatoarios de la de la Carta del uno por ciento muchas gracias
